title: protium altissimum
intro: Protium altissimum, also known as elemi, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Protium altissimum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Protium altissimum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through the use of its resin, which can be distilled to produce elemi oil, a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
